author: lOrm
content: Fixed silent flag drop: src/cli/repl/input.rs now reads multiSelect first (validator-canonical key) and falls back to multi_select for back-compat. Added two #585-banner tests in src/tools/ask_user.rs: fix585_canonical_multiselect_survives_validator (canonical key preserved + read pattern observes true) and fix585_legacy_multi_select_normalised_then_read_by_renderer (legacy key rewritten to canonical, renderer pattern still observes true). Verified: cargo test --lib fix585 → 2/2 pass.
